match.userMessage:
Handheld camera tracks forward alongside Scarlett walking at a relaxed pace along the weathered wooden promenade boards with natural stride momentum. Turquoise swells roll in the background as surfers rise on breaking waves. She turns her head and glances back over her shoulder toward the camera with effortless poise.

Scarlett delivers her line with effortless breezy tone, lips moving naturally while her body maintains forward momentum and her gaze briefly connects with the lens.

Salt breeze lifts fabric edges and loose strands while foam-tipped waves crest behind her under bright morning coastal light.

[SCARLETT, effortless breezy]: "Made for the water. Wear it everywhere."

Ambient sounds: ocean waves rolling, distant surfer calls, light coastal breeze. wooden board footsteps, gentle fabric rustle in breeze.
